title: Ani's Tensura Add-on
description:
Play as a mighty dragon and evolve through a full tree of species as you gain enough EP to become closer to the pinnacle of all living beings! 
Will you maintain your heavenly form, fall to your desires, or be poisoned by Ivaragé's tainted aura?
body:
**All Starting Races:**

"anitensura:lesser_dragon", "anitensura:angel", "anitensura:fallen_angel", "anitensura:phantom_soldier"

**New Racelines:**

_(Angels WILL fall to their respective counterparts using Marionette Hearts or consume increasing amounts of tainted essence to become Phantoms)_

Angel -> Power -> Virtue -> Dominion -> Throne -> Cherub -> Seraph

Fallen Angel -> Fallen Power -> Fallen Virtue -> Fallen Dominion -> Fallen Throne -> Fallen Cherub -> Fallen Seraph 

Phantom Soldier -> Commanding Officer -> Lieutenant Officer -> Field Officer -> General -> Staff Officer -> Admiral -> MYSTIC ANGEL!


# **Ani's Tensura Add-On**
_Play as a mighty dragon, angel, fallen angel, or phantom and evolve through a full tree of species as you gain enough EP to become closer to the pinnacle of all living beings!_

This mod was created to add new content to the Tensura: Reincarnated mod. This will start with races and expand into other content.

# THEY'RE HERE! STAY TUNED FOR PAGE CHANGES! MERRY CHRISTMAS!
![Seraphs, Fallen Seraphs, and Mystic Angels are here!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a49c3e99d27f8b021f44b33bc48b3dda4ccf585.png)
Angels, Fallen Angels, and Phantoms are **here**!

_Will you maintain your heavenly form, fall to your desires, or be poisoned by Ivaragé's aura-tainted magicules?_

## Currently Included:
### The Angel Race
### The Fallen Angel Race
### The Phantom Race
### The Dragon Race
Starting race: "anitensura:lesser_dragon"
![Dragon Evolution Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W7jJo1Cx/images/3f05e7d9c969d3b2c02a84cc667ee29d1e3c6be8.png)
 The branching evolution tree of the dragon races in version 0.1.5 of the mod and newer- A branching dragon evolution tree featuring 11 unique races and two main branching paths

- A choice between medium and ground dragon for your first evolution to raise your resistance to magics or become a wild hunting beast
- 8 randomized element types and accompanying skills for all Elemental Dragons and their lesser Arch Dragon Subspecies brethren in the main evolution branch
- Config options to allow the user(s) to choose which Element Dragon or Arch Dragon Subspecies type they get instead of randomizing it. This also allows for specific race names for each element
- An undead evolution branch stemming from the Arch Dragon stage which allows you to follow the path to becoming a Gehenna Dragon like Venti
- The ability to become an Origin/True dragon at the end of either major branch
- Wings! and NOW FLIGHT!

**Race Info**
![Dragon race abilities as of 0.1.6, updated descriptions in 0.1.7 note that spiritual attack resistance was not given to Dragon Lords in versions prior to 0.1.6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d37ea0cdbe00e5c4b0232b63f9fbdd3e9797b616.png)

AND...
- Automatic injection of the starting races into the default config _(if for any reason you have trouble, add "anitensura:lesser_dragon" to the starting and random races in defaultconfigs\tensura-reincarnated\common and if you created your world, add it to \saves\yourworldname\serverconfig\tensura-reincarnated\common)_
- A config file to allow adjustment of all EP evolution requirements _(by default. zombie dragon requires 10 demon essence, arch dragon subspecies requires 1 dragon essence and 3 elemental essence, and element dragon requires 3 dragon essence and 10 elemental essence)_

### Upcoming Features: 
Confirmed Features
- Angel, Fallen Angel, Phantom Races
- Giant Races

### Features Under Consideration:
- Elemental Races
- Different race stats for each element for Element Dragons and Arch Dragon Subspecies types
